Title: Inventory Summary Dashboard - Filter by Single Site

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as a valid user.
Step Expected: User is authenticated and the dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Navigate to the Inventory Summary dashboard.
Step Expected: Inventory Summary dashboard is displayed with all widgets showing data for all sites.

Step Action: Locate the site filter control on the Inventory Summary dashboard.
Step Expected: Site filter control is visible and accessible.

Step Action: Click the site filter and review the list of available sites.
Step Expected: A list of all available sites is displayed in the filter.

Step Action: Select one specific site from the filter list.
Step Expected: The single site is selected and highlighted in the filter control.

Step Action: Apply or confirm the filter selection.
Step Expected: All widgets on the Inventory Summary dashboard update to show only data from the selected site.

Step Action: Verify the widget data reflects only the items belonging to the selected site.
Step Expected: Each widget displays data exclusively from the selected site with no data from other sites.

Step Action: Verify the widgets update within 5 seconds of applying the filter.
Step Expected: All widgets finish updating within the 5-second performance threshold.

Step Action: Successfully verified that filtering the Inventory Summary dashboard by a single site updates all widgets to display only data from that site within the required time.

Title: Inventory Summary Dashboard - Filter by Multiple Sites

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as a valid user.
Step Expected: User is authenticated and the dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Navigate to the Inventory Summary dashboard.
Step Expected: Inventory Summary dashboard is displayed with all widgets showing data for all sites.

Step Action: Locate the site filter control on the Inventory Summary dashboard.
Step Expected: Site filter control is visible and accessible.

Step Action: Click the site filter and review the list of available sites.
Step Expected: A list of all available sites is displayed in the filter.

Step Action: Select two or more sites (but fewer than all sites) from the filter list.
Step Expected: Multiple sites are selected and highlighted in the filter control.

Step Action: Apply or confirm the filter selection.
Step Expected: All widgets on the Inventory Summary dashboard update to show only data from the selected sites.

Step Action: Verify the widget data reflects only the items belonging to the selected sites.
Step Expected: Each widget displays data from the selected sites only with no data from unselected sites.

Step Action: Verify the widgets update within 60 seconds of applying the filter.
Step Expected: All widgets finish updating within the 60-second performance threshold.

Step Action: Successfully verified that filtering the Inventory Summary dashboard by multiple sites updates all widgets to display only data from those selected sites within the required time.

Title: Inventory Summary Dashboard - Filter by All Sites

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as a valid user.
Step Expected: User is authenticated and the dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Navigate to the Inventory Summary dashboard.
Step Expected: Inventory Summary dashboard is displayed.

Step Action: Locate the site filter control on the Inventory Summary dashboard.
Step Expected: Site filter control is visible and accessible.

Step Action: Click the site filter and select all available sites.
Step Expected: All sites are selected in the filter control.

Step Action: Apply or confirm the filter selection.
Step Expected: All widgets on the Inventory Summary dashboard update to show data from all sites.

Step Action: Verify the widget data reflects items from all sites.
Step Expected: Each widget displays the complete dataset across all sites.

Step Action: Verify the widgets update within 60 seconds of applying the filter.
Step Expected: All widgets finish updating within the 60-second performance threshold.

Step Action: Successfully verified that selecting all sites in the filter causes all widgets to display data from every site within the required time.

Title: Inventory Summary Dashboard - Help Topic Content Available for Site Filter

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as a valid user.
Step Expected: User is authenticated and the dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Navigate to the Help section or click the Help icon within the application.
Step Expected: Help section is accessible and displayed.

Step Action: Search or browse for help topics related to filtering the Inventory Summary dashboard by site.
Step Expected: Site filter help topics are listed and available.

Step Action: Open a help topic related to the site filter feature.
Step Expected: Help topic content is displayed and is relevant to site filtering on the Inventory Summary dashboard.

Step Action: Verify the help topic covers how to select a single site and how to select multiple sites.
Step Expected: Help content provides clear guidance on both single-site and multi-site filter usage.

Step Action: Successfully verified that help topic content for the Inventory Summary dashboard site filter feature has been created and is accessible.

Title: Inventory Summary Dashboard - Filter with No Site Selected Shows Validation or Default State

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as a valid user.
Step Expected: User is authenticated and the dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Navigate to the Inventory Summary dashboard.
Step Expected: Inventory Summary dashboard is displayed with widgets showing data.

Step Action: Open the site filter control.
Step Expected: Site filter control is displayed with current selection visible.

Step Action: Deselect all currently selected sites so that no site is chosen.
Step Expected: All sites are deselected in the filter control.

Step Action: Attempt to apply the filter with no sites selected.
Step Expected: System either prevents application of an empty filter or reverts to a default state (e.g. all sites or the previous selection).

Step Action: Verify that the dashboard does not display an empty or broken state without user guidance.
Step Expected: A validation message is shown or the filter defaults to a valid selection; widgets display appropriate data.

Step Action: Successfully verified that the site filter handles a no-selection state gracefully without breaking the dashboard.

Title: Inventory Summary Dashboard - Filter Persists Single Site After Page Refresh

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as a valid user.
Step Expected: User is authenticated and the dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Navigate to the Inventory Summary dashboard.
Step Expected: Inventory Summary dashboard is displayed.

Step Action: Select a single specific site using the site filter and apply the selection.
Step Expected: All widgets update to show data from the selected site only.

Step Action: Refresh the browser page.
Step Expected: Page reloads.

Step Action: Verify the site filter retains the previously selected single site.
Step Expected: The same single site remains selected in the filter after the page refresh.

Step Action: Verify the dashboard widgets still display data from the previously selected site.
Step Expected: Widget data is consistent with the retained single-site filter.

Step Action: Successfully verified that a single-site filter selection persists after a page refresh.

Title: Inventory Summary Dashboard - Single Site Filter Widget Update Exceeds 5-Second Threshold

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as a valid user.
Step Expected: User is authenticated and the dashboard is displayed.

Step Action: Navigate to the Inventory Summary dashboard.
Step Expected: Inventory Summary dashboard is displayed with all widgets loaded.

Step Action: Open the site filter control.
Step Expected: Site filter is displayed.

Step Action: Select a single site from the filter list.
Step Expected: Single site is selected.

Step Action: Apply the filter and begin timing the widget refresh.
Step Expected: Filter is applied and widgets begin updating.

Step Action: Observe whether all widgets complete their update in under 5 seconds.
Step Expected: If widgets do not complete updating within 5 seconds a loading indicator or timeout message is displayed and the delay is noted as a defect.

Step Action: Successfully verified the performance behavior of single-site filtering and documented whether the 5-second threshold was met.

Title: Inventory Summary Dashboard - Multi-Site Filter Widget Update Exceeds 60-Second Threshold

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as a valid user.
Step Expected: User is authenticated and the dashboard is displayed.

Step Action: Navigate to the Inventory Summary dashboard.
Step Expected: Inventory Summary dashboard is displayed with all widgets loaded.

Step Action: Open the site filter control.
Step Expected: Site filter is displayed.

Step Action: Select the maximum number of available sites from the filter list.
Step Expected: All sites are selected.

Step Action: Apply the filter and begin timing the widget refresh.
Step Expected: Filter is applied and widgets begin updating.

Step Action: Observe whether all widgets complete their update within 60 seconds.
Step Expected: If widgets do not complete updating within 60 seconds a loading indicator or timeout message is displayed and the delay is noted as a defect.

Step Action: Successfully verified the performance behavior of maximum multi-site filtering and documented whether the 60-second threshold was met.

Title: Inventory Summary Dashboard - Single Site Filter Displays Only That Site's Data in All Widgets

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as a valid user.
Step Expected: User is authenticated and the dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Navigate to the Inventory Summary dashboard.
Step Expected: Inventory Summary dashboard is displayed.

Step Action: Note the data counts and values displayed in each widget before applying any filter.
Step Expected: Baseline widget data is documented for comparison.

Step Action: Select a single site from the site filter and apply the selection.
Step Expected: Filter is applied and widgets update.

Step Action: Compare the updated widget values against the baseline to confirm they have changed to reflect only the selected site.
Step Expected: Widget values differ from the all-sites baseline and reflect a reduced or site-specific dataset.

Step Action: Cross-reference at least one widget's data count with known data for the selected site.
Step Expected: Widget count matches the known data count for the selected site.

Step Action: Select a different single site and apply the filter.
Step Expected: Filter updates to the new site.

Step Action: Verify the widgets now reflect data for the newly selected site.
Step Expected: Widget data changes to match the second site's data.

Step Action: Successfully verified that the single-site filter correctly isolates and displays only that site's data across all Inventory Summary widgets.

Title: Inventory Summary Dashboard - Site Filter Not Available to Unauthorized User

Step Action: Attempt to access the Inventory Summary dashboard without logging in or with an expired session.
Step Expected: Login page is displayed or user is redirected to authenticate.

Step Action: Verify the site filter control is not accessible without valid authentication.
Step Expected: No site filter control is visible or accessible.

Step Action: Log in with valid credentials.
Step Expected: User is authenticated and the dashboard is displayed.

Step Action: Verify the site filter control is now visible and accessible.
Step Expected: Site filter is displayed and functional.

Step Action: Successfully verified that the Inventory Summary dashboard site filter is only accessible to authenticated users.
